title: Have questions about sales CRM?
excerpt: Thanks to all those that attended our awesome sales CRM community event! If you have any more questions about monday.com sales CRM post them below for a monday.com knowledge expert to answer!

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks to all those that attended our awesome sales CRM community event! If you have any more questions about monday.com sales CRM post them below for a monday.com knowledge expert to answer!

posts.author: Kirsty (Kirsty Doig)
posts.cookedHtml: If we missed the sales CRM community event, is there a recording of it or highlights?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kristy,

Sorry for the delay, we did not record the event but will have some demo and more QA sessions in the future so stay tuned! If you have any specific questions or things you want to see feel free to ask them in the CRM category!
